title: Crisis Response
persona: Humanitarian crisis monitor watching disaster posts in low-resource regions
headline: Zero-shot LLM-retrieved knowledge handles cities outside the training set.

posts.post: Banjir besar di tengah Pekanbaru, jalan ditutup semua
Need help — rescue boats in central Pekanbaru area, water rising fast
Pekanbaru floodwater up to my knee outside the masjid
